description_long: This object is a freestanding punching bag designed for boxing or fitness training, featuring a large, red, spherical striking surface at the top. The striking surface appears to be made of synthetic leather or rubber, with visible vertical seam lines running from top to bottom, suggesting reinforced construction. The bag is mounted on a slim, metallic pole that is height-adjustable, as indicated by a visible adjustment knob at the midpoint. The pole is anchored into a wide, heavy, circular black base, likely filled with sand or water to provide stability during use. The overall design is minimalistic and functional, with no visible branding or decorative elements. The object is suitable for placement in urban environments such as gyms, garages, parks, or sidewalks for public fitness use.
description: A freestanding punching bag with a red, spherical striking surface, mounted on a height-adjustable metal pole and anchored by a wide, black circular base. The design is sturdy and functional, with visible seam lines and an adjustment knob.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red striking surface, adjustment knob on the left, and the full circular base.
description_view_1: Side view with the adjustment knob not visible, highlighting the symmetry of the pole and base.
description_view_2: Rear view with the adjustment knob now on the right, showing the same vertical seams on the striking surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the adjustment knob not visible, emphasizing the clean lines of the pole and base.
